title: Grenade
why_this_song: Grenade by Bruno Mars (2010) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Oh-oh, oh, I would go through all this pain"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "But you won't do the same"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Gave you all I had, and you tossed it in the trash"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Gave you all I had, and you tossed it in the trash"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "To give me all your love is all I ever asked"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "through" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "through" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "same" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: You tossed it in the trash, you did
Madwoman, bad woman, that's just what you are
You said you loved me, you're a liar

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Take a bullet straight through my brain
You know I'd do anything for ya (yeah-yeah-yeah)

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Grenade" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Grenade" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Grenade" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Grenade", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Grenade" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Grenade" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
